message:
feat: Add Google Drive multi-tier capture strategy

- Implement captureGoogleDrive() with 4-tier fallback strategy
- TIER 1: Download button click with event capture
- TIER 2: Direct download URL via /uc?export=download
- TIER 3: Thumbnail endpoint with max size (w4000)
- TIER 4: Element/viewport screenshot fallback
- Complete Phase 4: Google Drive Support (Experimental)
